heading: Insurance for Museum
label: 2306 Insurance for Museum
text: The Museum shall maintain insurance on the memorial museum to cover such risks, in such amount, and containing such terms and conditions as the Museum deems necessary.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 2306, , , , related to audits of the Holocaust Memorial Council, prior to the general amendment of this chapter by .Pub. L. 105–225112 Stat. 1279Pub. L. 106–292Aug. 12, 1998
